text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh hey, I know you. Ehehe, did you hear me just
now?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Since you're here, lemme rant! You know
McQueen, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She told me the trick to long-distance running is
keeping a steady pace, then suggested I try doing
tempo runs.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But running at a set pace is such a drag! It feels SO much better to run as fast as I can!
choice_data_list: You should run the way that best suits you!

But think of how good it'll feel to sprint after
holding back.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you get it! The best type of training really
is the one that motivates you the most!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right! Time to sprint a lap at top speed! Here
comes the mighty Teio!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that she's able to focus much better on
her running while training the way she wants.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I getcha! Maybe you're right! An all-out
sprint after a paced run, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I bet that'll feel way better than just running
normally! Hehe, what a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna give this tempo running thing another
chance. Thanks for talking this out with me!
